verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Can you hear it Thunder in the distance When we worship The Lion of Judah roars Strongholds crumble all around us In the presence of our Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There’ll be vict’ry in the camp At the shout of El Shaddai Every enemy will flee From the fire in His eyes Every captive will be freed In this year of Jubilee When we hear the shout of El Shaddai
